description: Style NoteThis slip-on sandal from catwalk is a must-have in your wardrobe. The simple design is perfect for everyday wear and versatile enough to be teamed with dresses and jeans.Heel: 4.5& rdquo Product DetailsBrown sandal with synthetic forefoot strap with metal embellishments and is fastened by a tang claspSynthetic midfoot strap and an ankle strap with metal embellishments and the ankle strap is fastened by a tang claspSmooth footbedTextured TPR outsole with a heelMaterial and Care SyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
